{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032114294631CCF7D61E6FE3B2EDBF"}"},"total":2896},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7512702756138861337","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是我在柿子上唯二没有跳过任何一章，一个字不落看完的小说！！！写的特别棒！！！剧情不拖沓，设定也很有意思，比平行时空提前24个小时这点真的可以改变很多事情！最后完美的ending让我这几天的阅读画上完美的句号！此本小说我已下载，我相信在未来的某个时候，我一定会再次阅读！
最后再次谢谢作者写了这么一本好看的小说！！！
P.S. 我觉得苟姓很有特色(如有冒犯同姓的网友，实在抱歉！！！)毕竟我也是看了明侦这么多年的老人了，习惯了。","text_exts":[{"e":205,"s":201,"text":"这么多年","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%BF%99%E4%B9%88%E5%A4%9A%E5%B9%B4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774074586E3B2EDBF%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227512702756138861337%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227369172591002520600%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%BF%99%E4%B9%88%E5%A4%9A%E5%B9%B4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1749190368,"group_id":"7369172591002520600","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0yWKPG/0LdPGdy7XzV81Q33Tuq9Y1T2C6tyrRiwrBWO","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/15bbc5de44034b2892ff9ec182e76ab4~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776614847&x-signature=XgYERgYUonQA3Rf2x0mmBFzWxNk%3D","user_id":"4334707425150307","user_name":"LaRa88"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4334707425150307","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7369172591002520600","book_info":{"abstract":"快节奏破案+推理+直播+多种类案件+无CP+剧情流
苏野觉醒罪证直播系统，眼中所见全是证据！
自制炸药、碎尸凶杀、新型毒品、色播行业、多重杀猪盘……
每天都在上演千奇百怪的案件。
苏野：“美女，你裙子扒给我，这是死者穿过的。”
苏野：“我就撒个野尿，竟然能捡到杀人犯的擦屁纸！”
苏野：“抽奖送电动车？我送你去监狱还差不多！”
苏野：“胖子，这丸子不能吃！是人肉做的！”
网友们都以为苏野在演剧本，他却接连破奇案。
而直播间的网友，却发现了更惊人的真相……
苏野竟然能拯救另一个世界的案件！
